ddls:
CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the package the method belongs to */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class the method belongs to */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "method_signature" TEXT /* String representation of the method signature */,
  "method_return_type" TEXT /* Return type of the method */,
  "method_parameters" TEXT /* JSON array of method parameters */,
  "method_docstring" TEXT /* Docstring or comment above the method */,
  "loc" INTEGER /* Lines of Code (LOC) for the method */,
  "cyclomatic_complexity" INTEGER /* Cyclomatic Complexity (CYCLO) for the method */,
  "atfd" INTEGER /* Access to Foreign Data (ATFD) for the method */,
  "laa" INTEGER /* Local Access to Attributes (LAA) for the method */,
  "method_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the method was first created */,
  "method_last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the method was last modified */,
  "method_author" TEXT /* Author of the method */,
  "method_version" TEXT /* Version of the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_methods_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_methods_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package */,
  "package_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the package was first created */,
  "package_last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the package was last modified */,
  "package_author" TEXT /* Author of the package */,
  "package_version" TEXT /* Version of the package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the package the class belongs to */,
  "class_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the class was first created */,
  "class_last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the class was last modified */,
  "class_author" TEXT /* Author of the class */,
  "class_version" TEXT /* Version of the class */,
  "class_interfaces" TEXT /* JSON array of interfaces implemented by the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tools" (
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tool */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the tool */,
  "tool_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the tool */,
  "tool_version" TEXT /* Version of the tool */,
  "tool_website" TEXT /* Website or documentation URL for the tool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tool_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the method the result belongs to */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tool used */,
  "result" INTEGER /* Result of the analysis (True or False) */,
  "result_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the result (low, medium, high) */,
  "result_message" TEXT /* Detailed message or description of the result */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tool_results_tool_id FOREIGN KEY ("tool_id") REFERENCES tools ("tool_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tool_results_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "method_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the method the property belongs to */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property (e.g., is_long_method, is_feature_envy) */,
  "property_value" INTEGER /* Value of the property (True or False) */,
  "property_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the property */,
  "property_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the property (low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_method_properties_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the method involved in the relationship */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the package involved in the relationship */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class involved in the relationship */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., inherits_from, calls, uses) */,
  "relationship_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id")
)
